_comment: Feeds harvested by discover.py for new US data-center announcements. THESE ARE BRITTLE — if a feed stops yielding items, re-verify the URL (sites change RSS paths). Google News search feeds are the most robust + highest-signal; the named publisher feeds add depth. discover.py builds Google News feed URLs from `google_news_queries`.
google_news_queries: "data center" (announced OR planned OR proposed OR "breaks ground" OR "break ground" OR gigawatt) when:45d
"data center" (campus OR billion) (build OR investment OR approved OR rezoning OR permit) when:45d
("AI data center" OR hyperscale OR "data center campus") (planned OR announced OR "under construction") when:45d
